title: Per-pulse board link
excerpt: At the moment, you can link boards together but you can’t link a specific pulse in a “high-level board” to a specific “low-level board”. Ideally I’d like to break out high-level tickets to low-level boards and reflect th…

posts.author: tcmarimosa (Tom Crawley)
posts.cookedHtml: At the moment, you can link boards together but you can’t link a specific pulse in a “high-level board” to a specific “low-level board”. Ideally I’d like to break out high-level tickets to low-level boards and reflect the overall progress automatically to the high-level board.
